summary: QA accepts M7-RADAR-TASK-UI-001 after R3. The Radar Task UI now has protected list/create/detail/edit/deactivate flows, route-level loading/error states, recent run/latest opportunity context, explicit mock Run Scan behavior, server-action local admin checks, focused tests, and local-only documentation.

acceptance_criteria_review.criterion: Protected /radar-tasks list page with empty/loading/error-aware states.
Protected create/edit/detail/deactivate UI aligned with existing Radar Task schema and helper contracts.
Detail page shows task profile, recent runs, latest opportunities, and mock Run Scan control using existing /api/scans/run.
Local-admin-only assumptions, mock-provider default, and no public/provider/deployment scope creep.
Focused no-browser/no-network tests and required checks pass.

tests_run.result: PASS: 6 focused Radar Task tests passed.
PASS: Next build exited 0 with known nonfatal Windows SWC optional-native warnings.
PASS: focused local release smoke passed.
PASS: no whitespace errors; LF-to-CRLF warnings only.

requested_action: Integrate, close, commit, and push M7-RADAR-TASK-UI-001, then continue with M7-PHASE0B-RELEASE-SMOKE-001.
